title: NxAuctions
description: A Simple Auction Plugin with discord bridging
body:
# NxAuctions
**A lightweight, secure, and modern auction plugin with optional Discord bridging.**
NxAuctions allows players to easily auction items in-game with a clean and simple system. It is designed to work smoothly on public servers while remaining lightweight and performance-friendly.

## ✨ Features
- Simple and user-friendly auction system
- Players can list items for auction easily
- Secure item handling (no item loss)
- Discord auction notifications (optional)
- Lightweight & optimized for performance
- Works perfectly on public survival servers
- Clean messages & configurable settings

## 🔗 Discord Bridging
NxAuctions includes **optional Discord integration.**
When enabled, auction events are sent to a Discord channel using a bot.

You can:
- Enable/disable Discord bridging from config.yml
- Set your bot token
- Choose the Discord channel in channels.yml

⚠️ If you don’t want Discord features, simply disable Discord bridging in the config.

## ⚙️ Setup Guide
1. Stop your server
2. Install required dependencies (see below)
3. Put NxAuctions.jar into the /plugins folder
4. Start the server once to generate config files
5. Configure config.yml and channels.yml
6. Restart the server

## 📦 Dependencies (Required)
EssentialsX
Vault
**Make sure both plugins are installed and working properly.**

## 🧩 Compatibility
**Minecraft**: Java Edition
**Versions**: 1.21+
**Platforms**: Paper, Purpur, Spigot

## 🛠 Configuration
Fully configurable messages
Toggle Discord features on/off
Easy to edit YAML files
Beginner-friendly config structure

## 🆘 Support
Need help or found a bug?
Join the support Discord server from the Links section.
